sentence: 总统乘坐专机前往参加峰会。
pinyin: Zǒngtǒng chéngzuò zhuānjī qiánwǎng cānjiā fēnghuì.
english: The president flew on a dedicated aircraft to attend the summit.

sentence: 他在推特上认识了很多推友，经常互动。
pinyin: Tā zài Tuītè shàng rènshi le hěn duō tuīyǒu, jīngcháng hùdòng.
english: He has made many Twitter friends online and they interact frequently.

meaning: blog article; to write a blog article (netspeak)
sentence: 她写了一篇博文，分享了自己的旅行经历。
pinyin: Tā xiě le yī piān bówén, fēnxiǎng le zìjǐ de lǚxíng jīnglì.
english: She wrote a blog post sharing her travel experiences.

meaning: to change the laws; political reform; unconventional method
sentence: 晚清的变法运动试图推动政治改革。
pinyin: Wǎn Qīng de biànfǎ yùndòng shìtú tuīdòng zhèngzhì gǎigé.
english: The late Qing reform movement attempted to push forward political change.

sentence: 她从小学声乐，现在是一名专业歌手。
pinyin: Tā cóngxiǎo xué shēngyuè, xiànzài shì yī míng zhuānyè gēshǒu.
english: She studied vocal music from a young age and is now a professional singer.
